'''11-17''' was an [[11-17-series mining droid]] on [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]]. He assisted [[Zed]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and other [[Droid/Legends|droids]] in stopping [[Olag Greck]]'s plan to steal a shipment of [[ash ore]], and to destroy Hosk Station to conceal the evidence. 11-17 was instrumental in rescuing Zed from a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-eating [[hulgren]], and later he distracted the reprogrammed [[GRZ-6B wrecker droid|wrecking droid]] [[Grozbok]], allowing Zed to toss his [[Stun baton/Legends|stun stick]] into an opened access panel on the wrecking droid, disabling it.<ref name="Droids" />
